title: HARM REDUCTION CLINIC - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC HARM REDUCTION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term care for individuals with skin, wound, and soft tissue infections. Provides HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. Other services include syringe exchange, Naloxone distribution, health insurance enrollment, and referral to community resources. 12425 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Primary focus is injection drug users, but anyone can request services Hours: Monday/Thursday 11am-5pm (503) 988-0577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-0577 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Walk-ins accepted. FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 11am-2pm and 3pm-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Menlo Park Plaza, behind Walgreens Services: Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Navigator Programs * Drug Use Disorder Issues Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Wound Clinics Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HEALTHY STREETS NEEDLE DISPOSAL PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC
